title: Zero code patterns — evaluates code but has no reference examples
why_it_matters: Agent evaluates code quality but has zero code examples. Adding good/bad code pairs and SoNash-specific patterns (httpsCallable, Zod validation) would ground reviews.
suggested_fix: Add 100-200 lines of before/after code examples for SoNash patterns.

title: Zero code patterns — security review without vulnerable code examples
why_it_matters: OWASP-focused agent has no vulnerable vs secure code pairs. Security is show-don't-tell.
suggested_fix: Add 5-10 OWASP before/after pairs (SQLi, XSS, auth, etc.).

title: Zero code patterns — API design without examples
why_it_matters: 40-line stub with no REST/API patterns. Backend agents need concrete examples.
suggested_fix: Add Express.js route, middleware, error handling patterns (~100 lines).

title: Zero code patterns — React agent without component examples
why_it_matters: React specialist with zero code. fullstack-developer (same project) has 928 lines of code.
suggested_fix: Add React 19 + Tailwind component patterns specific to SoNash.

title: Zero code patterns — debugging without debug workflow examples
why_it_matters: 38-line stub. Debug patterns (breakpoints, log analysis, bisect) would improve output.
suggested_fix: Add debugging workflow examples and common error patterns.

title: Zero code patterns — CI/CD without config examples
why_it_matters: CI/CD specialist with zero config examples. Deployments need concrete templates.
suggested_fix: Add GitHub Actions, Dockerfile, K8s manifest examples.

title: 51KB agent with zero code examples or plan templates
why_it_matters: Core planning engine lacks visual PLAN.md template examples. Planners need to see what good output looks like.
suggested_fix: Add 2-3 complete plan examples (simple and complex).

title: 556-line agent with zero research output samples
why_it_matters: Researchers need calibration examples of what good RESEARCH.md looks like.
suggested_fix: Add sample RESEARCH.md output from recent phases.
